name: Skills/Speed swim (50m pool)
feel: struggled to go fast on the 100s; shoulders tired on pull
notes: Actual: 400 WU, 2x100 drill (long slow + finger drag), 10x100 hard (vs planned 12), 2x200 PB+paddles then 2x200 easy to finish (shoulders fatigued, vs planned 4x200). Total 2400m.

name: East Hampshire Road Cycling
notes: 1x Maurten 320 (80g) + 1x SiS Beta Fuel Chews (40g) + 1x SiS Choco Fudge bar (~26g) + half banana (~13g) = 159g over 180 min = ~53g/hr. Well below recent avg (87g/hr) and race target (90g/hr).

name: Wandsworth Road Cycling
notes: Same nutrition as Sun 7 Jun: 2x SiS Energy Choco Fudge bar (86g) + 2x SiS Beta Fuel Chews (90g) + 2x Maurten 320 (160g) + 3x High 5 Caffeine scoops (66g) + 2x PH1500 (electrolytes). 402g carbs over 247 min = ~98g/hr. 5 bottles = 2800ml.

name: Strength
notes: Morning session: 15 min ankle stability/strength, 15 min lower body mobility

name: Wandsworth Road Cycling
notes: Nutrition: PF30 (30g) + SiS Beta Fuel chews (45g) + Maurten 320 (80g) + High5 caffeine gel (44g) = 199g carbs. ~59g/hr over 202 min.

name: Wandsworth Running
notes: Ankle 2/10 in warm-up, cleared to 0 from km 2 onwards.

name: Wandsworth Road Cycling
notes: 2x SiS Energy Choco Fudge bar (86g) + 2x SiS Beta Fuel Chews (90g) + 2x Maurten 320 (160g) + 3x High 5 Caffeine scoops (66g) + 2x PH1500 (electrolytes). Total 402g carbs over 232 min = ~104g/hr. 5 bottles: 500+650+500+650+500 = 2800ml.

name: No lane system 🤬 on an otherwise lovely swim
Car drop, and more roo spotting
Swimming along the edge of the break
4 run 30 walk - so many wild Turks
Mid ride — 2 hr Z2 + sweet spot block

notes: If you log another note your fired.

name: Trying to keep up with KH

notes: 160g carbs total over ~3hr (~53g/hr — well below race target). Lots of traffic, hard to hold consistent effort. Ankle ok. Not that hot.

name: Social ride 85k + 3 hill reps
feel: felt good through to the end; stop-start finish from traffic/conditions, not fatigue
notes: Fuel: Maurten 320 (80g), SIS Beta chew (45g), half PF30 chew (15g), 2 scoops High5 Caffeine Hit (44g). 3×600ml bottles. ~57g/hr — appropriate for IF 0.69 ride. Workout: 3×5min @ FTP target on Surrey climbs. Actual reps 4:04 @ 326W, 2:57 @ 316W, 7:14 @ 317W. 95% volume / 102% power, all reps on or above 316W. Decoupling 15.8% whole-ride was traffic-driven (stop-start finish), not fatigue — per-rep decoupling clean (5-8%).

name: Z2 ride — 2 hr (pre-brick)
notes: Carbs 80g + 60g = 140g total (~79g/hr avg). 90% consumed in first 70 min — heavily front-loaded (~108g/hr early, trickle thereafter). Drank 1.1 L (~622 ml/hr). Noticed drinking a bit quick at 75 min but no GI issues. Ankle clean.

name: More of that lovely 9/1 rehab
notes: Pain 2/10 — same as Thu 7 May. Location varied by terrain: right Achilles on warmup and uphills, front of ankle on flat.

name: 5x400m
notes: Main set 5×400m @ CSS. Held 1:42–1:44 throughout — consistently 3–5s off target 1:39. Slight improvement rep 1→2 (1:44→1:42) but couldn't close the gap.

name: Fri 15 May - Long ride 4hr Z2
notes: Hr 1-2: Maurten 320 (80g) + 2 scoops Hi5 Caffeine Hit (44g) + Beta Fuel chew (45g) + SIS Banana Fudge bar (43g) = 212g. Hr 3-4: PF30 (30g) + 0.5 scoops Hi5 (11g) + Maurten 320 (80g) = 121g. Total 333g over ~4.1 hrs = ~81g/hr. Race-level fuelling.

name: Sat 16 May - Interval ride 2hr
notes: Main set: 5×5min @ 300W (95% FTP). Norm power 237W for full session.

name: 5k z2 no walking
notes: Pain 2/10 during, dropping to 0.5 at finish. First no-walk run. 0/10 next morning.

name: Elliptical
notes: Deliberate swap for planned Z2 run — avoided 4 consecutive running days on rehabbing ankle. Clears Wednesday for 60 min run if ankle allows.

name: 5x400css
notes: 6x400 CSS (1 extra rep). First 2 reps @ 1:45, final 4 @ 1:41. Negative split through the set. CSS target 1:39 — 2-6s off. Last 4 reps faster than any rep on 12 May (1:41 vs 1:42-1:44 last week).

name: Thu 21 May — Swim aerobic + technique ~2.1 km (~45 min)
Marseille Road Cycling
notes: Pre-ride: 1 banana (~25g carbs). During ride: 25g carbs, 600ml fluid.

name: Marseille — 9/1 Walk-Run
feel: RPE 5 dropping to 4 second half. No real pain, just legs didn't find a rhythm.
notes: 9/1 walk-run protocol. 3 full intervals + partial 4th. GAP 4:50-4:59/km on running portions. HR Z2 throughout (135-141). Temp 25C avg.

name: Marseille Road Cycling
notes: Pre-ride: 1 banana (~25g carbs). During ride: 3 Decathlon date bars (~105g carbs), 700ml fluid. Total ~130g over ~2.6 hrs = ~50g/hr.

name: Marseille Road Cycling
notes: 2 Decathlon date bars (~70g carbs) + handful Haribo (~25g). 1.2L fluid. ~53g/hr over 107 min.

name: Hot and windy
notes: 2x SiS Beta Fuel chews (90g) + PF30 (30g) + Maurten 320 (80g) + PF 1500 tab (0g) = 200g in-ride carbs = ~66g/hr. Pre-ride meal (2.5 eggs, tomatoes, brioche ~40g carbs, ~335g mass) excluded from carb rate. 700ml×2.5 + 500ml = 2250ml on bike. Post-ride 400ml. Net weight loss 500g. Food mass between weighings ~335g. Gross sweat = 500g + 335g food + 2250ml fluid = 3085ml over 182 min. Sweat rate ~1020ml/hr. Race target 90g/hr carbs.

name: Pool Swim
notes: Felt hard. Pace 1:48/100m vs CSS 1:39 — 9s off target.

name: Pool Swim
feel: found it tough, pushed last 2 reps hard
notes: Extra 300m added (2.4km vs planned 2.1km). Longer rest intervals. Last 2 reps at full effort. Active pace 1:45/100m vs CSS 1:39 — 6s off target.

name: Long run — Z2 continuous (13.5km)
notes: RPE 8 on an easy Z2 long run — high for Z2; athlete carrying fatigue (TSB -14). Run not yet synced to ICU.
